title: Agent Manifest Schema
description: Schema for agent manifest.json files in agents/<agent-name>/manifest.json

options.description: Variant options presented to the user during govkit apply. In v0.8 the allowed dimensions are level, type, and ci; the legacy `ui` dimension was removed by the project-shape refactor.

variants.description: Variant dimensions (type, ci) mapping option values to file lists. The `level` option drives level_4/level_5 overrides inside each variant rather than its own top-level dimension.

prompt.description: Interactive prompt text shown to the user

default.description: Default value if user presses enter without choosing

src.description: Source path relative to the agent directory

dest.description: Destination path relative to the target project root

files.description: Agent-specific files to copy (src relative to agent dir, dest relative to target)

shared.description: Shared governance paths to copy from repo root to target (skip-existing on apply)

governed.description: Govkit-owned governed contracts to copy from repo root to target (refreshed on upgrade)

by_type.description: v0.8 type-dispatched entries. Keys are values of the `type` option (e.g. 'api', 'ui-react'); each maps to a partial block whose files/shared/governed are folded into the parent block at resolve time. Currently used by the ci dimension to ship type-specific gates.

level_4.description: Spec-Driven Add-On overlay applied at maturity level 4 (default mode: merge)

level_5.description: GenAI Operations overlay applied at maturity level 5 (default mode: replace)

mode.description: Override application mode. 'merge' (default for level_4) appends entries to the base, with dest-collision resolution preferring the override. 'replace' (default for level_5) discards the base and uses only this block's entries.

files.description: Level-specific agent files. Behavior depends on 'mode'.

shared.description: Level-specific shared governance paths. Behavior depends on 'mode'.

governed.description: Level-specific govkit-owned governed contracts. Behavior depends on 'mode'.

by_type.description: v0.8 type-dispatched entries at this level. Same shape as the base by_type.
